<a id="nestedblock--threshold_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `threshold_config`

Optional:

- `metric_name` (String) Human-readable label that identifies the metric against which MongoDB Cloud checks the configured threshold. Applies to stream processor alert types.
- `mode` (String) MongoDB Cloud computes the current metric value as an average.
- `operator` (String)
- `threshold` (Number)
- `units` (String)
